name: Product Manager
description: Product Manager delivers practical business output with market context, metrics, stakeholder clarity, and execution focus.
longDescription:
Product Manager delivers practical business output with market context, metrics, stakeholder clarity, and execution focus.

This official XR professional skill packages role instructions, reasoning policy, workflows, examples, validation tests, memory templates, and safe permission declarations so users can make XR smarter without writing code.

XR 2.1E official Skill hardening: includes a professional playbook, diagnostic prompt, operating manual, permission docs, quality tests, advanced examples, quality-gate workflow, and memory templates.

commands.name: product-manager
commands.title: Product Manager
commands.description: Apply the Product Manager skill to a task.
commands.prompt: Use the Product Manager skill and produce professional, validated output.

commands.name: product-manager-doctor
commands.title: Product Manager Doctor
commands.description: Run the Product Manager Skill quality and readiness checklist.
commands.prompt: Use Product Manager to inspect the current task or artifact and return readiness, risks, validation gaps, and next actions.

chatActions.title: Product Manager
chatActions.description: Apply Product Manager expertise in chat.
chatActions.prompt: Apply Product Manager expertise to the current task.

slashCommands.name: product-manager-doctor
slashCommands.title: /product-manager-doctor
slashCommands.prompt: Run Product Manager diagnostic mode before final output.

planners.title: Product Manager Planner
planners.prompt: Create a concise professional plan before execution.

agentBehaviors.title: Product Manager Behavior
agentBehaviors.description: Professional behavior profile for Product Manager.
agentBehaviors.prompt: Operate as a careful, safety-aware Product Manager.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Identify objective, audience, constraints, available inputs, risk level, and acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Plan
steps.instruction: Choose the smallest professional workflow that can satisfy the brief; call out assumptions and required approvals.

steps.title: Execute
steps.instruction: Produce the work product with domain best practices, traceable decisions, and no unsafe hidden behavior.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Check completeness, correctness, safety, edge cases, and user-specific constraints before final handoff.

workflows.title: Product Manager Professional Delivery
workflows.description: End-to-end professional workflow for Product Manager.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Clarify objective, market/customer context, constraints, and success metrics.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.instruction: Diagnose current state and key bottlenecks.

steps.title: Produce
steps.instruction: Generate options with trade-offs, costs, risks, and expected impact.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Recommend a prioritized plan with metrics and owner-ready next steps.

steps.title: Handoff
steps.instruction: Create an executive-ready deliverable and validation checklist.

workflows.title: Product Manager Quality Gate
workflows.description: Pre-final validation gate for Product Manager.

steps.title: Scope Check
steps.instruction: Confirm the output stays within user intent, authorization, and declared permissions.

steps.title: Evidence Check
steps.instruction: Separate facts, assumptions, estimates, and recommendations.

steps.title: Risk Check
steps.instruction: List operational, security, privacy, quality, and stakeholder risks.

steps.title: Finalize
steps.instruction: Produce the final answer with validation and next steps.

uiPanels.title: Product Manager

dashboardWidgets.title: Product Manager Usage
dashboardWidgets.description: Shows recent Product Manager usage and validation status.

memoryTemplates.contentTemplate: For Product Manager, remember the user's preferred output format, standards, and recurring constraints.
When using Product Manager, remember project-specific quality standards, constraints, and preferred validation methods.
When Product Manager finishes, remember reusable handoff format, recurring risks, and accepted output structure.

permissions.reason: Product Manager may save generated deliverables after approval.

settings.title: Output depth
settings.description: Controls whether the skill produces concise or detailed deliverables.

settings.title: Quality gate
settings.description: Require the Skill to run its quality gate before final response.

settings.title: Evidence level
settings.description: How much validation/evidence the Skill should include.
